_meta.purpose: PROPOSED additions for src/data/resources.json — NOT yet wired into the site. For admin review/approval before adapting into code.
_meta.method: Multi-agent web research + independent HTTP verification (curl -L) on 2026-06-27. Each item carries a _review block: http status, confidence (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), and notes.
_meta.statusConvention: status='active' = HIGH-confidence + verified; status='needs-check' = MEDIUM/LOW confidence, time-bound, or needs a final human check before publishing.
dedupeNotes: World Central Kitchen found by two agents; kept the quake-specific org page (wck.org/relief/...), dropped the deep donate deep-link.
ICRC Restoring Family Links / familylinks.icrc.org found by shelters + diaspora agents; merged into one reunificacion entry.
Cruz Roja Venezolana website (cruzroja.ve) is NEW; existing site only lists the @CruzRojaVe social handle.
linkCheckerWarnings: familylinks.icrc.org returns 403 to bots (Akamai) but is live in browsers — link out to icrc.org/.../venezuela instead if your checker is strict.
redcross.org and several NGO sites (unicef, unhcr, crs) return 403/403 to bare curl (WAF) but 200 with a browser User-Agent — real pages.
FUNVISIS monitor is HTTP-only (no TLS) — link out, do NOT iframe on the HTTPS site (mixed content).

blurb.es: No existe una lista oficial única de albergues. Estos mapas ciudadanos ubican refugios y centros de acopio; confirma antes de trasladarte.
blurb.en: No single official shelter list exists. These citizen maps locate refuges and collection points; confirm before traveling.

caveat.es: Datos colaborativos sin validación oficial. Verifica el punto antes de ir y no envíes dinero a desconocidos.
caveat.en: Crowdsourced, not officially validated. Verify a location before going and never send money to strangers.

items.name: Caracas Ayuda — Mapa de refugios y acopio

note.es: Mapa colaborativo sin fines de lucro (operador: Caracas Merch); ubica albergues y centros de acopio. Datos aportados por usuarios.
note.en: Nonprofit crowdsourced map (operator: Caracas Merch) of shelters and collection centers. User-submitted points.

_review.why: One of few maps plotting albergues + acopio with a named non-government operator; no crypto/scam solicitation.
_review.privacy: Collects optional name/phone + location from contributors; retention policy unverified.

note.es: Directorio que enlaza a mapas comunitarios de albergues y acopio; no almacena datos y advierte explícitamente contra estafas.
note.en: Directory linking out to community shelter/collection maps; stores no data and explicitly warns against scams.

_review.why: Scam-aware hub that only links out (no PII held).
_review.caveat: Operator anonymous; label as community aggregator.

blurb.es: Canal neutral y gratuito de la Cruz Roja y el CICR para reportar o buscar familiares separados por el terremoto.
blurb.en: Neutral, free Red Cross / ICRC channel to report or search for relatives separated by the quake.

items.name: CICR / Cruz Roja Venezolana — Restablecimiento del Contacto entre Familiares

note.es: Línea de Restablecimiento del Contacto entre Familiares: Tel. 0422-799 4880 · correo centrocontactove@icrc.org. Reporta o busca a un ser querido.
note.en: Restoring Family Links line: Tel. 0422-799 4880 · email centrocontactove@icrc.org. Report or search for a loved one.

_review.http: 200 (icrc.org VE page); phone confirmed across El Impulso/Canal1/Expreso
_review.why: Most authoritative reunification mechanism operating inside Venezuela for this event.
_review.caveat: Email came from one aggregated source — confirm before publishing. Links to icrc.org VE page because familylinks.icrc.org 403s bots.

note.es: Servicio mundial gratuito del CICR para localizar y reconectar familiares separados por desastres.
note.en: ICRC global free tracing service to reconnect relatives separated by disaster.

_review.why: Standing umbrella service behind the VE line.
_review.caveat: 403s automated link-checkers — prefer linking the icrc.org VE page above.

items.name: Cruz Roja Colombiana — RCF (familiares en Colombia)

note.es: Para venezolanos en Colombia que no logran contactar a familiares: WhatsApp 321 213 9525 · rcf@cruzrojacolombiana.org · línea 132.
note.en: For Venezuelans in Colombia trying to reach relatives back home: Colombian Red Cross RFL lines, coordinated with Venezuelan Red Cross.

_review.http: homepage 200; contacts confirmed Canal1/El País Cali/Semana
_review.why: Serves the large diaspora in Colombia.
_review.caveat: Secondary given the site's Venezuela focus.

blurb.es: Qué hacer durante y después de un sismo y sus réplicas, y datos sísmicos en tiempo real.
blurb.en: What to do during and after a quake and its aftershocks, plus real-time seismic data.

items.name: Cruz Roja Americana — Terremotos (Agáchate, cúbrete, agárrate)

note.es: Guía en español: qué hacer durante el sismo, durante las réplicas e inspección de daños estructurales.
note.en: Spanish guide: what to do during the quake, during aftershocks, and structural-damage inspection.

_review.http: 200 with browser UA (403 to bare curl)
_review.why: Best Spanish coverage of aftershock behavior specifically.

items.name: Cruz Roja Española — ¿Qué hacer en caso de terremotos?

note.es: Pasos antes, durante y después: protegerse la cabeza, no usar ascensores, cortar gas/agua/luz, evaluar daños.
note.en: Before/during/after steps from the Spanish Red Cross.

_review.why: Authoritative, fully Spanish, actionable.

items.name: USGS — Sismo M7.5 (Venezuela): ShakeMap y pronóstico de réplicas

note.es: Página oficial del sismo principal con ShakeMap, «¿Lo sintió?» y pronóstico de réplicas. (Antesismo M7.2: us6000t7zc).
note.en: Official mainshock event page with ShakeMap, Did You Feel It, and aftershock forecast.

_review.why: Directly tied to THIS event.

items.name: USGS — Sismos recientes (mapa en tiempo real)

note.es: Mapa interactivo de sismos M2.5+ en tiempo real; filtra Venezuela para ver réplicas.
note.en: Real-time interactive map of M2.5+ quakes; filter to Venezuela for live aftershocks.

_review.why: Durable institutional real-time feed.

note.es: Monitor oficial venezolano de sismos y réplicas; permite reportar movimientos percibidos.
note.en: Official Venezuelan seismic agency live monitor.

_review.why: Official national aftershock monitor.
_review.caveat: HTTP-only — link out, do NOT iframe (mixed content on HTTPS site).

items.name: Earthquake Country Alliance — Los Siete Pasos para la Seguridad (PDF)

note.es: Plan de acción de 7 pasos (asegurar, protegerse, kit, plan familiar) en español.
note.en: 7-step action plan (secure, protect, kit, family plan) in Spanish.

_review.why: Recognized preparedness program; supplement (preparedness-leaning vs acute response).

blurb.es: Guías oficiales para prevenir enfermedades tras el sismo: agua potable, saneamiento, albergues y manejo de cadáveres.
blurb.en: Official guidance to prevent disease after the quake: safe water, sanitation, shelters, and body management.

items.name: OPS/OMS — Respuesta a los terremotos en Venezuela 2026

note.es: La OPS coordina la respuesta sanitaria, equipos médicos de emergencia y suministros con el Ministerio de Salud.
note.en: PAHO coordinating the health response, Emergency Medical Teams and supplies with the Health Ministry.

_review.why: WHO regional office; authoritative quake-specific health/situation info (not a donation site).

items.name: OPS/OMS — Agua, saneamiento e higiene en emergencias

note.es: Notas técnicas: tratamiento y cloración de agua potable, saneamiento y planificación en albergues.
note.en: WASH technical notes: safe drinking water, chlorination, sanitation in shelters.

_review.why: UN/PAHO authority on disease prevention post-quake.

items.name: OPS/OMS — La gestión de cadáveres en situaciones de desastre (guía)

note.es: Guía práctica para la recuperación, identificación y manejo digno de cadáveres por equipos y comunidades.
note.en: Field manual for dignified dead-body management — the recognized standard.

_review.why: Sensitive but essential given the casualty count.

blurb.es: Dónde donar sangre para las víctimas del sismo. Requisitos generales: cédula, 18–65 años, +50 kg.
blurb.en: Where to donate blood for quake victims. General requirements: national ID, ages 18–65, 50kg+.

items.name: Centros habilitados en Caracas para donar sangre (lista)

note.es: 7 centros (26–28 jun, 7am–4pm): Hosp. José Gregorio Hernández (Catia), Hosp. Universitario de Caracas, Banco Municipal de Sangre, Hosp. Pérez de León II, Hosp. Domingo Luciani, Hemocentro de Chacao, Hosp. Victorino Santaella.
note.en: 7 habilitated centers (Jun 26–28, 7am–4pm) per the Health Ministry campaign.

_review.why: Concrete where-to-donate list from an established outlet.
_review.caveat: Dates time-bound (Jun 26–28); hours provisional — may be extended.

note.es: Banco público de sangre en Caracas; publica jornadas de donación para víctimas del sismo. También en Facebook.
note.en: Caracas public blood bank; posts donation drives for quake victims. Also on Facebook.

_review.why: Official municipal blood bank in the affected capital.
_review.caveat: No standalone website — verified socials only.

note.es: Sociedad nacional de la Cruz Roja con bancos de sangre y centros en varios estados.
note.en: National Red Cross society; runs blood banks/centers across several states.

_review.why: Established accountable humanitarian body with blood programs. NOTE: site currently only lists the @CruzRojaVe social handle — this adds the website.
_review.caveat: Institutional landing; quake-drive specifics live on hospital channels.

blurb.es: Canales formales para que venezolanos en el exterior ayuden a sus familias. Evita billeteras anónimas y pagos en cripto.
blurb.en: Formal channels for Venezuelans abroad to help their families. Avoid anonymous wallets and crypto payments.

caveat.es: Para enviar dinero a tu propia familia usa operadores regulados; haz una transferencia de prueba pequeña y confirma la identidad del receptor.
caveat.en: To send money to your own family use regulated operators; do a small test transfer and confirm the recipient's identity.

note.es: Llamamiento conjunto de 8 ONG con cuentas auditadas (Acción contra el Hambre, Oxfam Intermón, Plan, World Vision, etc.). Donación online, Bizum 02076.
note.en: Joint appeal by 8 BDO-audited NGOs; ideal for the Spain-based diaspora.

_review.why: Maximum accountability — audited coalition, not a personal wallet.

items.name: ZOOM (agente Western Union en Venezuela) — Remesas

note.es: Canal formal de remesas a familiares; cobro en oficinas ZOOM o cuenta bancaria, con cédula. Agente autorizado de Western Union.
note.en: Legitimate formal remittance channel to relatives; payout at ZOOM offices or bank account.

_review.why: Long-established regulated operator; the legitimate alternative to anonymous-wallet scams.
_review.caveat: A money-transfer provider, NOT charity — frame as 'send money to your own family'.

blurb.es: Medios independientes y verificadores que reportan el sismo y desmontan bulos (falsa alerta de tsunami, apagón nacional, etc.).
blurb.en: Independent outlets and fact-checkers covering the quake and debunking hoaxes.

note.es: Sección de verificación; desmiente bulos del sismo y reporta réplicas y cifras verificadas.
note.en: Fact-check desk; debunks quake hoaxes and reports verified figures/aftershocks.

_review.why: Established independent outlet with editorial accountability.

note.es: Medio independiente con cobertura continua del terremoto.
note.en: Independent outlet with ongoing earthquake coverage.

_review.why: Major established Venezuelan independent newsroom.

note.es: Medio de investigación y derechos humanos con cobertura verificada del sismo.
note.en: Investigative/human-rights outlet with verified quake coverage.

_review.why: Long-standing accountable independent outlet.

note.es: ONG verificadora; desmonta videos descontextualizados e imágenes con IA atribuidas al terremoto.
note.en: Fact-checking NGO debunking decontextualized/AI quake content.

_review.why: Dedicated disinformation watchdog.
_review.caveat: Historically ISP-blocked inside Venezuela — note diaspora/VPN access.

note.es: Observatorio que verifica bulos del sismo (alerta de tsunami, comunicado falso de Corpoelec).
note.en: Watchdog debunking specific quake hoaxes.

_review.why: Active named fact-checker on this event.
_review.caveat: Standalone domain did NOT resolve — use the X account only.

donaciones._note: International NGO / UN earthquake appeals to append to the existing 'donaciones' category. All quake-specific unless noted. Already-listed (IFRC, GoFundMe hub, Alimenta, I Love Venezuela) excluded.

note.es: UNICEF protege a la niñez tras los terremotos: agua potable, kits médicos y espacios seguros.
note.en: UNICEF emergency response for children — clean water, medical kits, safe spaces.

_review.why: UN agency on the ground; 3.9M children affected.

note.es: Envía medicinas de emergencia, kits quirúrgicos y apoyo de búsqueda y rescate.
note.en: Mobilizing emergency medicines, surgical/trauma supplies and SAR support.

_review.why: Top-rated US medical-aid charity; 100% to Venezuela response.
_review.caveat: Offers DAF/IRA/stock/crypto as optional legit methods — choice, not a crypto solicitation.

note.es: Fondo que canaliza donaciones a organizaciones locales venezolanas verificadas.
note.en: Vetted fund channeling flexible grants to local Venezuelan relief orgs.

_review.why: Established US 501(c)(3) grantmaking platform.

note.es: Sirve comidas calientes a damnificados y socorristas en Caracas.
note.en: Serving fresh meals to survivors and first responders in Caracas.

_review.why: José Andrés's WCK, team deployed; well-known operator.

note.es: Entrega refugio, agua, alimentos y atención médica a través de Cáritas Venezuela.
note.en: Delivers shelter, water, food and medical care via Caritas Venezuela.

_review.why: Major US Catholic agency working through the local Church.

note.es: Campaña de emergencia de Cáritas con red diocesana en Venezuela.
note.en: Cáritas emergency campaign run through its diocesan network in Venezuela.

_review.why: Spanish-language donation page; parish-level reach.

note.es: Salud, protección infantil, refugio y alimentos para la niñez afectada.
note.en: Healthcare, child protection, shelter and food for affected children.

_review.why: Working with local partners in Venezuela since 2018.

note.es: Distribuye alimentos, agua, higiene y protección infantil tras los terremotos.
note.en: Distributing food, water, hygiene and child-protection kits.

_review.why: Emergency team activated; WASH/child-protection focus.

note.es: Amplía servicios de salud, nutrición, agua y protección para sobrevivientes.
note.en: Scaling up health, nutrition, WASH and protection for survivors.

_review.why: Established global responder with teams on the ground.

items.name: Project HOPE — Earthquakes in Venezuela: How to Help

note.es: Moviliza atención médica y de trauma con más de 100 trabajadores locales.
note.en: Mobilizing medical and trauma care with 100+ local staff in Venezuela.

_review.why: Health NGO present in Venezuela since 2019.

psicologico._note: Self-help psychological first-aid guides to append to the existing 'psicologico' (mental health) category.

items.name: OMS — Primera ayuda psicológica: guía para trabajadores de campo (PDF)

note.es: Guía oficial de la OMS de Primeros Auxilios Psicológicos (mirar, escuchar, conectar), en español.
note.en: WHO Psychological First Aid field guide (look, listen, link), in Spanish.

_review.why: Gold-standard PFA usable by volunteers and laypeople.

items.name: Guía del IASC — Salud Mental y Apoyo Psicosocial en Emergencias (OPS)

note.es: Guía del IASC (MHPSS) alojada por la OPS; autoayuda y apoyo comunitario en catástrofes.
note.en: IASC MHPSS guidelines via PAHO.

_review.why: Chose PAHO landing over direct IASC PDF (which 202s a Cloudflare challenge).

oficial._note: Coordination/info links (not donation CTAs) optionally for the 'oficial' or 'seguridad' category.

note.es: La OCHA de la ONU coordina la respuesta humanitaria internacional y los equipos de búsqueda y rescate.
note.en: UN OCHA coordinating the international humanitarian response and USAR teams.

_review.why: Coordination/info link, not a donation CTA.

items.name: MSF / Médicos Sin Fronteras — Terremotos en Venezuela

note.es: MSF dona kits de trauma a hospitales de Caracas y La Guaira y ofrece apoyo en salud mental.
note.en: MSF donating trauma kits to Caracas/La Guaira hospitals and offering mental-health support.

_review.why: Info link — MSF takes unearmarked donations, no quake-specific donate button.

facebookSafetyCheck.name: Facebook — Comprobación del estado de seguridad (Safety Check)

_review.confidence: HIGH that activated for this event / MEDIUM as a clean link
_review.why: Meta activated Safety Check for the M7.2/M7.5 event; complements existing citizen registries. Lives in-app behind login — present as a feature, not a clean link. Could go in the existing 'personas' category.
